summary: Successfully verified the booking form fix from iteration 1. The critical 422 validation error has been resolved - booking form now correctly maps eventType to event_type field, enabling successful form submissions with proper toast notifications.

minor_issues.issue: Returns HTML instead of JSON response

passed_tests: Booking form submission works correctly with proper field mapping (event_type)
Success toast notification appears: 'Enquiry submitted successfully! We will contact you within 24 hours.'
Form validation works for required fields and email format
Backend API /api/bookings returns 201 status for successful booking creation
All navigation pages work correctly (Events, Committee, Groups, Activities, Hall Hire)
Mobile navigation and responsive design working
Error handling works with HTML5 validation for invalid inputs
All backend API endpoints return correct status codes and data
No error messages appear during successful form submission
